## Checklist

- [ ] Skill structure follows `review-<domain>/SKILL.md` + `references/checklist.md` convention
- [ ] Scoring weights in `review-full/SKILL.md` match `README.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md` (if weights changed)
- [ ] Report output path follows `docs/<domain>-review.md` naming convention
- [ ] `tests/workflow-tests.sh` passes locally (if workflow/engine-config changed)
- [ ] Updated the skill list in all locations if adding/removing a skill (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
